description: AI-powered compliance investigation with evidence gathering, pattern analysis, and regulatory mapping

agents.name: Evidence Gatherer
agents.description: Collects and organizes evidence from transaction records, communications, and audit trails for compliance investigations

agents.name: Pattern Matcher
agents.description: Identifies suspicious patterns, anomalies, and behavioral correlations across financial data

agents.name: Regulatory Mapper
agents.description: Maps findings to specific regulations, requirements, and violation types with severity assessment
